channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Trump declares Us-Iran ceasefire “over” after new strikes
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- FirstFT: Trump declares US-Iran ceasefire ‘over’
- Trump Says Iran Ceasefire 'Is Over'
- Trump Says Iran Ceasefire 'Over' After Fighting Flares
- Trump declares ceasefire with Iran over during angry broadside at Nato summit
- Trump says ceasefire ‘over’ after US, Iran trade attacks
- Trump says ceasefire is 'over' after US and Iran trade strikes
- Trump says ceasefire with Iran "is over"
- Trump declares ceasefire with Iran has ended
- Trump Says Ceasefire With Iran Is Over
- Iran war: Trump says ceasefire 'over' after fresh strikes
- Trump says Iran ceasefire ‘over’ after fighting flares
- Donald Trump declares the ceasefire with Iran is ‘over’
- Urgent: Trump says ceasefire with Iran "is over"
- Trump says Iran ceasefire 'over' after fighting flares
- Trump says Iran ceasefire 'is over'
- Ceasefire with Iran over, says Trump in big declaration at NATO Summit after US strikes
- Ceasefire with Iran no longer in effect — Trump
- US-Iran ceasefire ‘over’ – Trump
- Trump Says Ceasefire With Iran No Longer Valid
- Trump Says US-Iran Ceasefire Is ‘Over’ After Hormuz Strikes
- Trump says Iran ceasefire over after fighting flares
- Iran ceasefire is over, says Trump
- Trump says Iran ceasefire ‘is over’]]>
